REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS THE WILLIAM MCKINLEY BUILDING, LLC, SHARON MANNING'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO ITEMS 1-7 (SEE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT). MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT THESE ALLEGATIONS ARE FALSE, IMPROPER, IRRELEVANT, OR NOT DRAWN WITH CONFORMITY WITH THE LAWS. MOTION IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AT TO ITEM 8 (SEE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT) FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT THESE DAMAGES ARE "ADDITIONAL DAMAGES" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC 3334 AND TO ALLEGE CAUSATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE WILLIAM MCKINLEY BUILDING, LLC, SHARON MANNING'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Shoshana Raphael of Zacks Freedman & Patterson (415.956.8100) for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to items 1-7 (See Notice of Motion and Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint). Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show that these allegations are false, improper, irrelevant, or not drawn with conformity with the laws. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend at to item 8 (See Notice of Motion and Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint) for plaintiff to allege facts showing that these damages are "additional damages" within the meaning of CC 3334 and to allege causation. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
